units.source_text: 相比2024年12⽉31⽇，集團零售貸款組合於2025年12⽉31⽇的預期信貸損失準備增加3億美元，批發貸款組合的預期信貸損失準備減少3億美元。
units.translation_target_text: Compared with December 31, 2024, the expected credit loss provisions of the group's retail loan portfolio on December 31, 2025 increased by US$300 million, and the expected credit loss provisions of the wholesale loan portfolio decreased by US$300 million.
units.translation_en: Compared with December 31, 2024, the expected credit loss provisions of the group's retail loan portfolio on December 31, 2025 increased by US$300 million, and the expected credit loss provisions of the wholesale loan portfolio decreased by US$300 million.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Compared with December 31, 2024, the expected credit loss provisions of the group's retail loan portfolio on December 31, 2025 increased by US$300 million, and the expected credit loss provisions of the wholesale loan portfolio decreased by US$300 million.

units.source_text: 相比2024年12⽉31⽇，由於經濟前景改善，零售和批發貸款組合的集團預期信貸損失敏感度在所有⼀致境況下均有所下降。零售貸款組合⽅⾯，
units.translation_target_text: Compared to December 31, 2024, the group's expected credit loss sensitivity for the retail and wholesale loan portfolio has decreased across all scenarios as the economic outlook improves. In terms of retail loan portfolio,
